profile.name: Manish Tiwari
profile.title: Full Stack Engineer
profile.tagline: Architecting Scalable Systems & Immersive Digital Experiences
profile.bio: I am a Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience specializing in building high-performance web applications. My passion lies at the intersection of robust backend architecture and cutting-edge frontend interactions.

caseStudies.title: Scaling Microservices to 1M+ Users
caseStudies.problem: Legacy monolithic architecture causing 5s+ latency and frequent downtime during peak traffic.
caseStudies.solution: Migrated to a distributed microservices architecture using Go, gRPC, and Kubernetes with automated horizontal scaling.
caseStudies.impact: Reduced P99 latency by 85%, achieved 99.99% uptime, and cut infrastructure costs by 30%.

caseStudies.title: Real-time Collaborative Engine
caseStudies.problem: High conflict rates in concurrent document editing and poor synchronization over unstable networks.
caseStudies.solution: Implemented a CRDT-based sync engine using WebSockets and Redis for low-latency state propagation.
caseStudies.impact: Sub-100ms sync across global regions and 0% data loss during network partitions.
